title: Multi-project search
description: New MCP tool: search_all(query) that searches across all indexed projects. Merge and re-rank results. Show project path in results.

title: Code-specific ONNX embedding model
description: Evaluate and switch to a code-trained embedding model with ONNX support. Candidates: nomic-embed-code, jina-embeddings-v2-base-code. Must work without PyTorch. Benchmark against current all-MiniLM-L6-v2.
close_reason: Code-specific embedding config ready, ONNX default maintained

title: Auto-reindex on file changes
description: Background watcher thread using watchfiles. Detect file saves and incrementally update index. Debounce to avoid re-indexing on rapid saves. New MCP tool: watch_project(path) to start/stop.

title: Language-aware metadata in chunks
description: Add language, symbol_type (function/class/method/config/doc), and symbol_name to chunk metadata. Enable filtering in search_code by symbol_type parameter. Depends on AST chunking.

title: Symbol dependency graph
description: Extract call relationships from AST: which functions call which. Store as adjacency list. New MCP tools: find_callers(symbol, project_path) and find_callees(symbol, project_path). Depends on AST chunking.

title: Diff-aware search
description: New MCP tool: search_diff(query, project_path, since='HEAD~1'). Uses git diff to identify changed files, indexes only their chunks, searches within changes. Useful for code review.

title: v0.3.0: Smart code search
description: Major feature release: AST chunking, code embeddings, auto-reindex, multi-project, context results, symbol graph, diff search

title: Context-aware search results
description: Add context_lines parameter to search_code (default 0). Return chunk + N surrounding lines from the original file. Requires storing file content or re-reading at search time.

title: AST-aware chunking with tree-sitter
description: Parse code into AST using tree-sitter. Extract functions/classes/methods as individual chunks with proper boundaries. Fallback to line-based chunking for unsupported languages. Support: Python, Go, JS/TS, Rust, Java, C/C++, Bash.
close_reason: AST-aware chunking with tree-sitter implemented for 9+ languages
